name: phd-management-system
description: Periyar University PhD Admission Management System — Enterprise Monorepo

scripts.start: concurrently "node gateway.js" "node student/backend/server.js" "node admin/backend/server.js" "node supervisor/backend/server.js" "node center/backend/server.js"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:student-fe" "npm run dev:admin-fe" "npm run dev:supervisor-fe" "npm run dev:center-fe" "npm run dev:portal-fe"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run start:student-be" "npm run start:admin-be" "npm run start:supervisor-be" "npm run start:center-be" "npm run dev:student-fe" "npm run dev:admin-fe" "npm run dev:supervisor-fe" "npm run dev:center-fe" "npm run dev:portal-fe"
scripts.install:all: npm run install:student && npm run install:admin && npm run install:supervisor && npm run install:center && npm run install:portal
scripts.install:student: cd student/backend    && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.install:admin: cd admin/backend      && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.install:supervisor: cd supervisor/backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.install:center: cd center/backend     && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
